sections.heading: Technology that makes industrial processes smoother
sections.text: New Infrared Technologiesâ (NIT) medium infrared cameras are built to monitor heat- and light-intensive environments and processes, such as welding and laser additive manufacturing. Because they are uncooled, NITâs cameras provide industrial customers with a cost-effective solution for tracking the efficiency of industrial processes, especially, and most currently, in the automotive industry. Technology that makes industrial processes smoother âRight now we are marketing specific solutions for brake disc coating,â Carlos de Miguel, a process engineer at NIT, said. âThe industry is starting to move toward applying more resistant coating to brake discs to make them more durable.â...
